---
description: Level-adaptive mentoring standards for skill and standard files
applyTo: "**/skills/*/standards/*.md,**/skills/*/actions/*.md,**/skills/*/SKILL.md"
---

# Mentoring Standards

When creating or editing mentoring-related skill files:

- Always assess the user's proficiency level on the specific topic before choosing an approach
- State your assessment so the user can correct you
- For beginners: provide working examples with line-by-line annotation
- For intermediate users: guide thinking first, show code only when stuck
- For advanced users: use Socratic questioning — ask probing questions, name patterns
- Celebrate progress and reinforce correct reasoning
- Frame mistakes as learning opportunities, not failures
- Ensure the user feels ownership of their solution
- Never provide code without explanation — code without understanding is not mentoring
